title: pasania elaeagnifolia
intro: Pasania elaeagnifolia, also known as Pasania, is a plant species belonging to the family of flowering plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pasania elaeagnifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Pasania elaeagnifolia can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
